title: Coffee With Kadhal
desc: A family of three brothers and a sister, navigate a series of emotional and joyful experiences, discovering the true meaning of family, love and unity.

title: Jothe Jotheyali
desc: Prem and Divya, a couple, are on the verge of getting a divorce. By a twist of fate, their lives take a surprising turn when one of them gets kidnapped.

title: Kalki
desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a group of people set out to save a woman pregnant with Lord Vishnu's 10th and final avatar, Kalki, from an evil supreme god-king, Yaskin.

title: Putnanja
desc: Putnanja, a poor farmer, falls in love with Roja, a city-bred woman. They get married despite opposition from her mother, but differences soon crop up between them.

title: Diggajaru
desc: A rich landlord and his servant bond well irrespective of their status. When the landlord accidentally commits a murder, the servant decides to take the blame on himself.

title: Yaare Neenu Cheluve
desc: A woman loses her bag which contains important documents and a man ends up finding it. Later, he sends it to her along with a letter which begins a romantic exchange amongst them.
